policy.allowed_input: Only Candidate adjudication decisions with decision=accept_taxonomy, writeback_action=add_up, dry_run_eligible=true, and proposed_field=up.
policy.write_policy: No concept cards are edited in Writeback dry-run. This artifact only proves the later limited apply set.
policy.field_policy: Only child-card top-level `up` may be planned; never add `down`, `children`, Juggl fields, or Breadcrumbs mirror fields.
policy.non_taxonomy_policy: Rejected/control-point/support/execute/standardize/component/adjacency rows remain excluded even if they are conceptually important.

excluded.reason: Excluded from Writeback dry-run because it is not accept_taxonomy + add_up + proposed_field=up.
Excluded from Writeback dry-run because it is not accept_taxonomy + add_up + proposed_field=up.
